zh.Bramall Hall, Bramhall, Wrenbury, Cheshi: 英國英格蘭爾布拉哈爾
zh.Davenport, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾達文波特
zh.Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Ches: 英國爾普雷斯特波利馬可萊斯費爾德 聖 邁克爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Davenport於大約1226年出生在英國爾普雷斯特波利馬可萊斯費爾德 聖 邁克爾時，他的父親Baron Vivian de Davenport37歲，母親Baroness Beatrix de Hulme19歲。他於大約1245年與Lady Mary Salemon在英國爾斯維頓哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1297年11月在英國英格蘭爾達文波特享年72歲，埋葬在英國爾普雷斯特波利。

zh-hans.Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Ches: 英国爾普雷斯特波利馬可萊斯費爾德 聖 邁克爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger Davenport于大约1226年出生在英国爾普雷斯特波利馬可萊斯費爾德 聖 邁克爾时，他的父亲Baron Vivian de Davenport37岁，母亲Baroness Beatrix de Hulme19岁。他于大约1245年与Lady Mary Salemon在英国爾斯維頓哈姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1297年11月在英国英格兰爾達文波特享年72岁，埋葬在英国爾普雷斯特波利。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Davenport was born about 1226, in Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, England, his father, Baron Vivian de Davenport, was 37 and his mother, Baroness Beatrix de Hulme, was 19. He married Lady Mary Salemon about 1245, in Swettenham, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in November 1297, in Davenport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Ches: Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Davenport est né environ 1226, à Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Baron Vivian de Davenport, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Baroness Beatrix de Hulme, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary Salemon environ 1245, à Swettenham, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en novembre 1297, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Ches: Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Davenport um 1226 in Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron Vivian de Davenport 37 und seine Mutter Baroness Beatrix de Hulme 19. Er hat um 1245 in Swettenham, Cheshire, England Lady Mary Salemon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im November 1297 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Davenport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Prestbury, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Davenport è nato il circa 1226 nel Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Baron Vivian de Davenport, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Beatrix de Hulme, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mary Salemon circa 1245, nel Swettenham, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel novembre 1297, nel Davenport, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

ja.Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Ches: イギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーマククレスフィールド スト ミチャエル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Davenportが約1226年にイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーマククレスフィールド スト ミチャエルで生まれた時，父Baron Vivian de Davenportは37歳，母Baroness Beatrix de Hulmeは19歳であった。約1245年にイギリスチェシュアイアスウエッテンハムでLady Mary Salemonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1297年11月にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルトで72歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Ches: 영국 체실르 플레스트버이 맥클스필드 스트 믹하얼
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Davenport(이)가 대략 1226년 영국 체실르 플레스트버이 맥클스필드 스트 믹하얼에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Vivian de Davenport(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Beatrix de Hulme(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1245년 영국 체실르 스베텐함에서 Lady Mary Salemon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 대븐포트에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 플레스트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Davenport nasceu aproximadamente 1226, em Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baron Vivian de Davenport, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Beatrix de Hulme, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary Salemon aproximadamente 1245, em Swettenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1297, em Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Ches: макклесфиелд ст мачаел, престбури, чешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger Davenport родился около 1226 г. в местности макклесфиелд ст мачаел, престбури, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Baron Vivian de Davenport было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Beatrix de Hulme, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary Salemon около 1245 г. в местности светтенам, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер ноябрь 1297 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности престбури, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger Davenport nació aproximadamente 1226, en Macclesfield St Michael, Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Baron Vivian de Davenport, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Baroness Beatrix de Hulme, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Lady Mary Salemon aproximadamente 1245, en Swettenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en noviembre de 1297, en Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
